component.name: omron-rs
component.summary: Scan, pair, and read data from Omron BLE blood-pressure monitors

description.p: A command-line tool that talks Bluetooth Low Energy to Omron blood pressure monitors. Supports the proprietary Omron memory protocol (for HEM-* cuffs) and the BLE-standard Blood Pressure Service / RACP (for any spec-compliant cuff, e.g. the Omron Complete).

ul.li: info — read Device Information and GATT tree
pair — drive in-process BlueZ Just-Works bonding + Omron app-level key
read — drain stored records via Omron's memory protocol
read-bps — subscribe to BLE-standard BP Measurement indications
sync — drain every stored record via RACP (--format table|json|csv)
set-time — write the cuff's wall clock via the standard Current Time Service
probe — generic subscribe-and-dump for reverse-engineering vendor characteristics
